# Entrypoints

### Build Scripts

| Name | Path | Description |
|------|------|-------------|
| build | `package.json#scripts.build` | build: nest build |

### Server Entry Points

| Name | Path | Description |
|------|------|-------------|
| start | `package.json#scripts.start` | start: nest start |
| start:dev | `package.json#scripts.start:dev` | start:dev: nest start --watch |
| main.ts | `src/main.ts` | Main |
